Related Entities

  • hospital PARDEE HOSPITAL HENDERSON COUNTY 5-star overall rating
  • hospital ADVENTHEALTH HENDERSONVILLE 4-star overall rating
  • snf Carolina Village Inc 5-star, 58 beds
  • snf Valley Hill Health & Rehab Center 2-star, 150 beds
  • snf The Lodge at Mills River 5-star, 50 beds
  • snf Orchard Valley Health and Rehabilitation 1-star, 134 beds
  • snf The Greens at Hendersonville 3-star, 120 beds
  • snf The Laurels of Hendersonville 3-star, 100 beds
  • snf Life Care Center of Hendersonville 3-star, 80 beds
  • snf Hendersonville Health and Rehabilitation 5-star, 130 beds
  • snf Fletcher Rehabilitation and Healthcare Center 1-star, 90 beds
Methodology

Data source: Medicare Geographic Variation by County (dataset ID: geo-var-county). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-13. Rows in source: 33,639.

Additional data sources: CDC PLACES County-Level Data (2026) CDC SDOH Measures for County (2017-2021)

Medicare Geographic Variation shows standardized per capita spending, utilization, and demographic characteristics for Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries at the county level. Standardized payments remove geographic payment adjustments to enable fair comparison across regions.

Full methodology →
